biological_replicate: we collected paired blood and tissue samples from forty-four patients with lung cancer
technical_replicate: Each sample was digested and run in triplicate injections
experimental_design: we compared the transcriptomes of paired pretreatment versus on-treatment samples and nonresponders versus responders
factor_value: The S100A1low group had higher proportions of patients with partial response... than did the S100A1high group
number_of_fractions: No fractionation or pre-fractionation is described anywhere in the text
